name: Climbing Monstera Plant - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your home decor aesthetic with this Artificial Climbing Monstera Potted Plant from Threshold™. This artificial potted plant features a realistic-looking climbing monstera to bring a touch of nature to your indoor space, and it comes potted inside a black ceramic pot for easy display on any surface. Just place it in the entryway or living room along with other potted plants to transform your space into a charming oasis.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
